chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesnвҖҷt require advanced technical knowledgeвҖ”just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

careers.intro: бһҷбһҫбһ„бһҮбһ¶бһҖбҹ’бһҡбһ»бһҳбһӮбҹ’бһҡбһ№бҹҮбһҸбһјбһ…бһҖбҹҶбһ–бһ»бһ„бһҹбһ¶бһ„бһҹбһ„бҹӢ Chatforia вҖ” бһҖбһҳбҹ’бһҳбһңбһ·бһ’бһёбһ•бҹ’бһүбһҫбһҹбһ¶бһҡбһҹбһҖбһӣбһҜбһҖбһҮбһ“бһҠбҹӮбһӣбһҠбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһұбҹ’бһҷбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһ“бҹ…бһӣбһҫбһңбҹҒбһ” iOS бһ“бһ·бһ„ Androidбҹ” бһ”бһҫбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһҒбҹ’бһңбһӣбҹӢбһҒбҹ’бһңбһ¶бһҷбһўбҹҶбһ–бһёбһ—бһ¶бһ–бһҜбһҖбһҮбһ“ бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһўбҹҠбһ·бһ“бһӮбҹ’бһҡбһёбһ” бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ”бһ‘бһ–бһ·бһҹбҹ„бһ’бһ“бҹҚбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһҠбҹҸбһҡбһёбһҖбһҡбһ¶бһҷ бһҷбһҫбһ„бһ…бһ„бҹӢбһҹбҹ’бһҸбһ¶бһ”бҹӢбһ–бһёбһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбҹ”

careers.whyBullets:
вҖў бһҮбһҪбһҷбһҹбһ¶бһ„бһҹбһ„бҹӢбһҳбһјбһӣбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“бһ“бҹғбһҖбһҳбҹ’бһҳбһңбһ·бһ’бһёбһ•бҹ’бһүбһҫбһҹбһ¶бһҡбһҹбһҖбһӣбһҗбҹ’бһҳбһёбҹ”
вҖў бһҠбһ¶бһҖбҹӢбһұбҹ’бһҷбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҖбҹӮбһӣбһҳбҹ’бһўбһҠбҹӮбһӣбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһ“бҹ…бһ‘бһјбһ‘бһ¶бҹҶбһ„бһңбҹҒбһ” iOS бһ“бһ·бһ„ Androidбҹ”
вҖў бһ’бҹ’бһңбһҫбһҖбһ¶бһҡбһҠбҹ„бһҷбһ•бҹ’бһ‘бһ¶бһӣбҹӢбһҮбһ¶бһҳбһҪбһҷбһҹбҹ’бһҗбһ¶бһ”бһ“бһ·бһҖбһӣбһҫбһҹбҹ’бһҗбһ¶бһ”бһҸбҹ’бһҷбһҖбһҳбҹ’бһҳ бһ“бһ·бһ„бһ‘бһ·бһҹбһҠбҹ…бһ•бһӣбһ·бһҸбһ•бһӣбҹ”
вҖў бһӮбҹ’бһҡбһ”бҹӢбһӮбҹ’бһҡбһ„бһҸбҹҶбһ”бһ“бҹӢбһ•бһӣбһ”бҹүбҹҮбһ–бһ¶бһӣбҹӢбһҒбҹ’бһ–бһҹбҹӢбһ“бҹғ stackбҹ– бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһ•бҹ’бһүбһҫбһҹбһ¶бһҡ бһҹбҹҶбһЎбҹҒбһ„ бһңбһёбһҠбҹҒбһўбһј бһҖбһ¶бһҡбһўбҹҠбһ·бһ“бһӮбҹ’бһҡбһёбһ” бһ‘бһјбһҡбһӮбһҳбһ“бһ¶бһӮбһҳбһ“бҹҚ AIбҹ”
вҖў бһ…бһјбһӣбһҡбһҪбһҳбһҸбһ¶бҹҶбһ„бһ–бһёбһҠбҹҶбһ”бһјбһ„ вҖ” бһҳбһ»бһ“бһ–бҹҒбһӣбһҳбһјбһӣбһҠбҹ’бһӢбһ¶бһ“бһўбҹ’бһ“бһҖбһ”бҹ’бһҡбһҫбһ–бһ„бҹ’бһҡбһёбһҖбҹ”

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (вҖңweвҖқ, вҖңusвҖқ) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we canвҖҷt read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as вҖңSTOPвҖқ) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
